title: DECORATIVE COMPUTERS
description: DECORATIVE COMPUTERS- small mod that will improve the decor in the game, added computers you can decorate your home with them. Start from a monitor with a keyboard to a laptop, we update the mod from time to time to fix bugs and add more decor.
body:
![new](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71d9b704dfdfa939f96617ee36ef33560617f968.png)
##  📖 About:
DECORATIVE COMPUTERS- small mod that will improve the decor in the game, added computers you can decorate your home with them. Start from a monitor with a keyboard to a laptop, we update the mod from time to time to fix bugs and add more decor.

## 💬Links for communication and support:
The continuation of mod, but with gadgets:https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decorative-gadgets
Discord server You can suggest ideas or report bugs:https://discord.com/invite/rhp64hzkH8

Please do not distribute the mod on other sites.Thanks to the entire development team.
